title: “Trump Orders Disclosure of UFO Files Amid Obama Claims”
description: President Donald Trump announced his intention to instruct federal agencies to disclose government files concerning aliens and unidentified flying objects due to the significant public interest in the topic. Trump took to social media to declare that he would task Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth and other agencies with releasing the information, emphasizing the issue’s high [...] The post “Trump Orders Disclosure of UFO Files Amid Obama Claims” appeared first on Daily Dhaka Times .

title: Photo Of Multiple Alien Craft Over California
description: JULY 1990 SANTA ISABEL CALIFORNIA A San Diego man says he has photographic evidence of UFOs flying over the East County. He shot a photo showing 10 objects in the sky while on a hike near Santa Isabel. The man claims his picture... is the best [...]

title: UFO Crashes In Venezuela
description: 6-15-04 GURI DAM VENEZUELA An unidentified flying object crashed last Saturday, May 15, 2004 in the vicinity of the Raul Leoni Hydroelectric Station, also known as the Guri Dam, located on the Caroni River some 100 kilometers from the mouth of the [...]

title: The US Shoots Down UAP Over Lake Huron, See 10 Videos From the Pentagon's Second UFO File Dump
description: The Pentagon's release of declassified UFO files has reignited debate over unexplained aerial phenomena, with new videos and reports prompting calls for transparency from lawmakers and the public.

title: UFO files reveal new evidence of secret invasion by mysterious silver spheres
description: The Pentagon's latest batch of UFO files revealed even more disturbing encounters with strange orbs throughout the world.
